description_long: This bungalow features a brick exterior with a prominent green gabled roof and a red chimney stack. The front facade includes a white door with a golden knob, flanked by two green columns and a large window with blue framing and white muntins. On one side, there is an attached extension with a sloped black roof, constructed from the same brick material. The rear of the bungalow is plain, with a single circular window and no additional openings. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall structure is compact and single-storied, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods. The building's design is simple, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, geometric forms.
description: A compact brick bungalow with a green gabled roof, red chimney, and large front window beside a white door. The structure includes a side extension and minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white door, large blue-framed window, green columns, and the main green roof with chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain brick wall, circular window, and the red chimney on the green roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green roof, brick wall, and the attached side extension with a black roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large blue-framed window and the gabled green roof, no door visible.
